title: HoverText
description: SetWord Plugin is a lightweight plugin that allows players to display custom words above their heads. The text persists even after players log out and rejoin, making it perfect for roleplay servers, VIP designation, or just for fun!
body:
SetWord Plugin is a lightweight plugin that allows players to display custom words above their heads. The text persists even after players log out and rejoin, making it perfect for roleplay servers, VIP designation, or just for fun!
Key Features

✅ Set custom text above players with ```/setword <player> <word>```

✅ Automatically saves text and restores it after relog

✅ Configurable via ```config.yml```

✅ Uses ```TextDisplay``` for optimized performance

✅ Minimal impact on server performance

How to Use?

1️⃣ Install the plugin in the ```/plugins/``` folder

2️⃣ Restart the server

3️⃣ Use ```/setword <player> <word>```

Permissions

```setword.use``` — Allows using the ```/setword``` command (default: OP)

🚀 Enhance your server customization with SetWord Plugin! 🚀
